description: 10-commit auto-pipeline rollup since prior poll 2026-05-01T23:05:49Z. All 10 commits routine auto-pipeline output, NO manual commits, NO source-file touches, but HOLD #11 daily-AI-review FIRED (b73722c at 07:08:24Z, 27min EARLIER than predicted 07:35Z) — ENDING the daily-AI-review HOLD streak that started at HOLD #10 on 2026-05-01T07:37Z. Composition: 7x 'Auto-update ECM status' (status_history.json + monitor_log.txt + latest_hash.txt only): c3b9f56 (00:03:03Z), 5856cf6 (03:48:06Z), ebcced1 (05:59:28Z), 8edf108 (07:57:45Z), 8882aef (09:17:51Z), 20e5f0a (10:14:40Z), 6f2b9c6 (11:11:07Z); 2x 'auto: ECM data pull' (live_data.json + tracking.html minor): 9f0ab7d (01:30:33Z), 82f1f6c (07:17:41Z); 1x 'auto: daily AI review' (HOLD #11 termination): b73722c (07:08:24Z). HOLD #11 commit b73722c content: 2 files changed — docs/data/daily_review.json +5/-5 (only timestamp fields generated_at/generated_human, live_monitor.timestamp, eclipse_days 102→101, summary string day-count 102→101) and docs/tracking.html +3/-21 (timestamp + summary string refresh). REGISTRY-UPDATE STEP REMAINS GATED: daily_review.json registry block unchanged at confirmed=69, prospective=10, refined=4, registry_ratio_pct=94.5; live_monitor block unchanged at wins_confirmed_monitor=67, overall_score=100.0, passed=28/28, pending_domains=11. So HOLD #11 had the same signature as HOLD #10: cron-alive, content-changed-on-non-registry-fields-only, registry mutation skipped. This is the SECOND consecutive daily-AI-review run that fired with the registry-update step gated; consecutive 'HOLD-fired-without-registry-update' streak now = 2. Each Auto-update commit appends one history entry to status_history.json (~+747/-0 lines for the row, per HOLD #10 pattern; pattern continues). Each data-pull commit refreshes live_data.json and tracking.html. All 10 commits authored by 'GitHub Action' or 'ECM Auto-Pipeline'; no human-author commits; no merge commits; no force-push activity. Source-file SHAs unchanged across 5+ polls now: monitor.py 9de912a8, scripts/pull_data.py aa0573fe, scripts/build_daily_review.py ceddb04f, inject_ai_layer.py 58996a0c, verify_predictions.py db947cab, generate_manifest.js 786842ed. ai_manifest.json unchanged at 405d5c9371aa8ad32f040528e1731eb1/14880. Manual-commit drought now 15.00d / 359.91h since last manual a57e731 (2026-04-17T12:02:38Z); 27 consecutive polls of auto-only commits; 15d threshold breached at 12:02:38Z TODAY (~5min from this poll's 11:57Z timestamp). The Auto-update cadence stayed at ~1.5h average across the 7 Auto-update commits (12.85h total / 7 = 110min mean spacing — slightly longer than usual ~65min because of the early-morning gap between 00:03Z and 03:48Z and another small gap 11Z→12:57Z); cron behavior nominal. The daily-AI-review streak resumed at b73722c after 1-day HOLD; next opportunity HOLD #12 ~07:35Z 2026-05-03 — if it fires AND skips registry-update again, that's 3 consecutive 'HOLD-fired-without-registry-update' events and the manual-approval-gate hypothesis becomes the strong default.
